name: Wave Storm
explanation: A wavetable-scanning synth in the Waldorf Blofeld lineage — distinct from the factory's fixed-wave PPG/Wavestation units: a smooth wavetable of eight single-cycle frames (built at init from harmonic spectra) is scanned continuously by a Position control and swept by the envelope (Scan), so the timbre morphs over each note. Resonant low-pass with its own envelope, amp envelope, 8-voice poly. Controls: Position, Scan (envelope→position), Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount and Level.
